title: pelargonium durum
intro: Pelargonium durum, also known as South African geranium, is a plant species in the geranium family that is native to South Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of P. durum include relieving digestive issues, such as diarrhea and stomach ulcers, as well as reducing stress and anxiety. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, including teas and tinctures, to take advantage of its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
